query: SELECT autouw_proposalid,mgacode,source,proposalnumber,totalemployeepayroll,totalofficerownerpayroll,govstate,govclass,reruncarriers,enteredby,enteredon,updateby,updateon,autouweligible,pobegin,initflags19,pilotprogram,isnull(updateon, enteredon) as dl_watermark FROM dbo.autouw_proposals WHERE isnull(updateon, enteredon) > CAST('2026-06-21 23:10:04.647000' AS datetime2)
